topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)

questions.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
options: He has not done this work since Monday.
I have been waiting for an hour.
I have been living here since 2020.
I have been living here for two years.
questions.answer: I have been living here for two years.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।" = "I have been living here for two years."

options: this
waiting
studying
living
questions.answer: living
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I have been living here since 2020."

questions.sentence: She have been studying for three hours.
options: She have been studying for three hours.
She has been studying for three hours.
questions.answer: She has been studying for three hours.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She has been studying for three hours."

questions.hindi: वह सुबह से पढ़ रही है।
options: He has been sick for two months.
She has done this job since 2021.
We have been friends for five years.
She has been studying since morning.
questions.answer: She has been studying since morning.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह सुबह से पढ़ रही है।" = "She has been studying since morning."

questions.sentence: We have been _____ for five years.
options: sick
practicing
in
friends
questions.answer: friends
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "We have been friends for five years."

questions.sentence: We has been friends since college.
options: We has been friends since college.
We have been friends since college.
questions.answer: We have been friends since college.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We have been friends since college."

questions.hindi: उसने एक हफ्ते से यह काम नहीं किया।
options: They have been in this house since their marriage.
I have been living here for two years.
He has not done this work since Monday.
He has not done this work for a week.
questions.answer: He has not done this work for a week.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने एक हफ्ते से यह काम नहीं किया।" = "He has not done this work for a week."

options: waiting
living
studying
this
questions.answer: this
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "He has not done this work since Monday."

options: I has known this for ten years.
I have known this for ten years.
questions.answer: I have known this for ten years.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have known this for ten years."

options: She has done this job for four years.
She has been studying since morning.
He has been sick for two months.
I have known this since 2015.
questions.answer: I have known this since 2015.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे 2015 से यह जानकारी है।" = "I have known this since 2015."

friends
practicing
sick

questions.answer: He has been sick since his birthday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He has been sick since his birthday."

questions.hindi: वे तीन साल से इस घर में हैं।
options: We have been practicing since the beginning.

She has done this job since 2021.
